ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the district is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the institution is located */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., university, college, school) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the institution (e.g., government, private) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the institution */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the staff member is employed */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the staff member (e.g., principal, professor, lecturer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_staff_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the facility is located */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility (e.g., library, laboratory, auditorium) */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., academic, sports, recreational) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_facilities_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the students were admitted */,
  "year_of_admission" INTEGER /* Year of admission */,
  "students_admitted" INTEGER /* Number of students admitted */,
  "admission_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for admission (e.g., merit, entrance exam) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the admission record of the student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "student_email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "student_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the semester is offered */,
  "semester_number" INTEGER /* Semester number (e.g., 1, 2, 3, etc.) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_semesters_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the semester where the course is offered */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course (e.g., CS101, MATH202) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_courses" (
  "student_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student-course record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who took the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course taken by the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade obtained by the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution whose performance is being tracked */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the semester for which performance is being tracked */,
  "pass_percentage" REAL /* Pass percentage of students in the institution for the given semester */,
  "average_cgpa" REAL /* Average CGPA of students in the institution for the given semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Full name of the official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., admin, analyst, etc.) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the official (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official accessing the data */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., office, remote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the institution (e.g., 4.5/5) */,
  "rating_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the rating is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_ratings_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)
